summary: Iteration 28 backend regression covering May-2026 classification rule change (Registered=pipeline_data, Unregistered=naukri without match), new /api/data/classification endpoint, refactored /api/data/registered and /api/data/unregistered, /api/summary extended fields (total_registered_hr / total_unregistered_naukri), isTest safety (test rows excluded from counts), and OTP worker camelCase aliases (otpGeneratedAt / otpExpiry). 14/14 tests pass (100%). All numbers match brief exactly: total_registered=100798, total_unregistered=15555, total_naukri=35469, matched=19914. iteration_27 endpoints still regression-green.

auth: POST /api/login 'Admin User'/'Admin User' -> 200 + access_token cookie; GET /api/auth/check -> 200
classification_new: GET /api/data/classification -> 200 with keys {total_registered, total_unregistered, total_naukri, matched, note}
isTest_safety: Insert pipeline_data isTest:true row -> /api/data/registered total unchanged; /api/data/classification total_registered unchanged
Insert naukri_applies isTest:true _is_registered:false row -> total_unregistered unchanged on both /api/data/classification and /api/data/unregistered
All TEST_iter28 seed rows deleted post-test (verified 0 leftover in pipeline_data/naukri_applies/bb_registrations)
summary_extended: GET /api/summary -> 200 with new top-level fields total_registered_hr and total_unregistered_naukri matching raw collection counts; legacy total_registered (JOIN view count) still present
otp_worker_camelcase: Insert test bb_registrations (isTest:true, is_shortlisted:true, schedule_date=today, schedule_time = now+2h within 3h-1min window); within ~30-60s worker sets otp, otp_sent=true, otp_sent_at (snake_case) AND otpGeneratedAt + otpExpiry (camelCase)
otpExpiry ISO equals interview datetime ISO exactly (replace(second=0,microsecond=0)); otpGeneratedAt == otp_sent_at
regression_iter27: GET /api/applicants pagination page=1 vs page=2 -> rows distinct

critical_code_review_comments: Classification rule correctly implemented via VIEW-based (no physical duplication) approach: /api/data/classification reads directly from pipeline_data + naukri_applies, avoiding Atlas quota impact.

isTest exclusion consistently applied: {'isTest': {'$ne': True}} filter in /api/data/classification, /api/data/registered, /api/data/unregistered, and /api/summary's new counters — defensive and backward-compatible (old docs without isTest field still included).
/api/summary preserves legacy total_registered (JOIN-based 19914) while adding total_registered_hr (100798) and total_unregistered_naukri (15555) — no breaking change for existing clients.

OTP worker correctly writes BOTH snake_case (otp_sent_at) and camelCase (otpGeneratedAt, otpExpiry) fields atomically in a single update; otpExpiry is ISO of exact interview datetime (interview_dt.isoformat()), which aligns with the 3h-1min send window and the 8h fallback expiry worker.

/api/data/registered maps pipeline_data -> unified column shape (job_title<-job_role, date_of_application<-last_update, date_of_birth<-degree). The last mapping is a known compromise since pipeline_data has no DOB column; acceptable per task brief but worth documenting in API response note for consumers.

bg_workers.py side-effect: OTP worker also writes otpGeneratedAt/otpExpiry to registered_candidates for matching email/phone — useful for cross-collection consistency but may touch multiple docs if duplicates exist.
seed_data_creation: Transient test seed data inserted and deleted within each test: pipeline_data TEST_iter28_pipeline_* (isTest:true), naukri_applies TEST_iter28_naukri_* (isTest:true, _is_registered:false), bb_registrations TEST_iter28_otp (isTest:true). Verified 0 leftover after suite completion. No modifications to real production data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration28_classification_otp.py covers: login, /api/data/classification, /api/data/registered, /api/data/unregistered, isTest exclusion for both collections, /api/summary new fields, OTP worker camelCase aliases, and iter27 regression. All test inserts use isTest:true prefix 'TEST_iter28_' and are deleted in finally blocks — safe to re-run. OTP worker test waits up to 75s for the 30s-interval worker. If classification rule changes again, update TestClassification expected counts and TestSummaryExtended's new-field assertions.

mocked_apis.WhatsApp AiSensy: Returns 401 (gracefully handled) - inherited, not tested in iter28
